channel.title: ZKP on Wenjin Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ZKP on Wenjin Blog

item.title: Cryptographic and Physical Zero-Knowledge Proof Systems for Solutions of Sudoku Puzzles
item.description: 论文见Cryptographic and Physical Zero-Knowledge Proof Systems for Solutions of Sudoku Puzzles。本篇论文详细的介绍了关于数独问题的密码学和物理上的零知识证明协议。可以了解

item.title: How to explain zero-knowledge protocols to your children
item.description: 在文章 How to explain zero-knowledge protocols to your children 中通过阿里巴巴与神秘的洞穴的故事介绍了什么是零知识证明。中文翻译文章见【译】How to Explain Zero-Knowledge Protocols to Your Children。下面简

item.title: The Incredible Machine
item.description: 本篇是博客《The Incredible Machine》的笔记，文章通过一个数独的故事来解释什么是零知识证明。 先总结一下这个过程： 交互式证明。Alice知道数独

item.title: Dan Boneh Cryptography I Week1
item.description: 开始学习密码学，这是一套不错的课程。官方课程链接Online Cryptography Course。教材A Graduate Course in Applied Cryptography，Coursera上的链接

item.title: Zero Knowledge Proofs: An illustrated primer
item.description: 原文链接：Zero Knowledge Proofs: An illustrated primer One of the best things about modern cryptography （密码学） is the beautiful terminology （术语）. You could start any number of punk bands（朋克乐队） (or Tumblrs) named after cryptography terms like ‘hard-cor
